artifact_summary: Screenshot of a Generator Faceplate software interface showing control and status indicators for Generator No.1.
artifact_blurb: A detailed screenshot of an industrial 'Generator Faceplate' HMI (Human-Machine Interface) displaying real-time telemetry and control logic for Generator No.1. The interface highlights critical operational states including Operator Mode, Motor Status, and Control Status, utilizing specific graphical icons and alphanumeric text labels to facilitate remote monitoring and troubleshooting.
